title: Let me craft saddles!
description: A Simple neoforge mod that lets you craft saddles in 1.21.4-1.21.5.
body:
**Just a simple mod that lets you craft saddles**

---

**- Note, this mod also adds fullbright to the game via /fullbright and to remove it /cleareffects, i was just experementing and forgot to remove it, This is only in the Mod versions though, the datapack is just the saddle crafting**
